message:
feat(fp-frame): add DataFrame.expanding().skew()/kurt() parity (frankenpandas-1c8t)

Wires Series::expanding().skew()/kurt() through the
DataFrameExpanding apply_expanding harness so the DataFrame surface
matches pandas' `pd.DataFrame.expanding().skew()` /
`pd.DataFrame.expanding().kurt()`. Non-numeric columns are skipped
per the existing reducer policy.

Tests:
- df_expanding_skew_matches_series_skew_per_column confirms a
  symmetric column produces skew≈0 at a fully-populated window.
- df_expanding_kurt_matches_series_kurt_per_column confirms the
  uniform five-value input [1..=5] yields kurt=-1.2 (pandas
  reference).
- df_expanding_skew_kurt_skip_non_numeric confirms Utf8 columns
  are elided from the result frame.

Co-lands frankenpandas-c9zz (kurt).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
